publishedAbstract: - Ceph Cluster is shown as Degraded from the OpenShift Console.- It is not possible to run Ceph commands from inside the `rook-ceph-tool` pod.- The `rook-ceph-operator` shows the following error: ~~~ Traceback (most recent call last):   File "/usr/bin/ceph", line 1327, in     retval = main()   File "/usr/bin/ceph", line 1032, in main     cluster_handle = run_in_thread(rados.Rados,   File "/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ceph_argparse.py", line 1527, in run_in_thread     t.start()   File "/usr/lib64/python3.9/threading.py", line 899, in start    _start_new_thread(self._bootstrap, ()) RuntimeError: can't start new thread#> oc exec-it rook-ceph-operator-6db7677b5f-b7kvx-n openshift-storage--  ceph osd df tree Traceback (most recent call last):   File "/usr/bin/ceph", line 1327, in     retval = main()   File "/usr/bin/ceph", line 1032, in main     cluster_handle = run_in_thread(rados.Rados,   File "/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ceph_argparse.py", line 1527, in run_in_thread     t.start()   File "/usr/lib64/python3.9/threading.py", line 899, in start    _start_new_thread(self._bootstrap, ()) RuntimeError: can't start new thread ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph Cluster in Degraded Status with error "can't start new thread: exit status 1"
